meaning: n.辛巴德(<<天方夜谭>>中的人物)
examples: He is Sinbad: Legend of the seven seas.
Sinbad: How can I do anything else? My friend.
So, get ready to sail the seven seas with Sinbad!
C. and a series of films based on the adventures of Sinbad the sailor.
He also was behind "The Golden Voyage of Sinbad, " where a one-eyed centaur battles a part-lion, part-eagle creature known as a griffin.
